description: Operator notes for the structure-integrity agent. Watch items + targeted checks.

notes.title: Watch monitor/analyst/human-notes.json for schema regression — file should be {description, notes:[...], last_updated}, NOT a bare top-level array
notes.body:
BACKGROUND

On ~2026-05-01 evening, monitor/analyst/human-notes.json was rewritten by some agent run from {description, notes:[...], last_updated} to a bare top-level array. This caused analyst's Mode 2 dispatcher (which uses `n.notes ? n.notes.filter(...) : []`) to silently return 'NO NOTES' for any pending HNOTEs — fail-safe but the silent-ignore failure mode is high-impact (operator HNOTEs ignored, no warning).

Operator restored the schema wrapper at commit 2a1f8f0 on 2026-05-05. If the file reverts to bare-array form, that signals a writer-side bug in some agent (most likely analyst when it consumes HNOTEs).

WHAT TO CHECK

During your daily run, add a one-liner to your existing checks:

  node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('monitor/analyst/human-notes.json','utf8'));if(Array.isArray(d))console.log('SCHEMA REGRESSION: monitor/analyst/human-notes.json is bare array, expected object with .notes')"

If it triggers, write an integrity finding with:
  - severity: moderate
  - category: schema_drift
  - title: 'analyst/human-notes.json schema regression'
  - evidence: 'Top-level type is array; expected object with description/notes/last_updated keys. See HNOTE-OPERATOR-WATCH-ANALYST-HNOTES-SCHEMA-001.'
  - recommended_action: 'Identify the agent run that re-flipped the schema (git log --oneline -- monitor/analyst/human-notes.json), file ISS for that agent's writer bug, restore the wrapper.'

The OTHER human-notes.json files (monitor/decisions/, monitor/curmudgeon/, monitor/social/) should also follow the {description, notes, last_updated} pattern — extend the check if you want, but the analyst one is the only confirmed regression so far.

MARK CONSUMED when: the check is added to your daily routine. Routinizing the check is the goal; you don't need to hit it on a regression to mark consumed.
notes.acceptance: Schema check added to integrity's daily run. Any future regression surfaces as a moderate finding within ~24h instead of going silent for days.
